settings.title: Free Worldwide Shipping
settings.body: PAWD offers complimentary standard shipping on all orders worldwide. No minimum spend, no promo code — every order ships free, every time.

settings.title: Processing Time
settings.body:
All orders are processed within 1–2 business days (Monday–Friday, excluding public holidays). Orders placed after 1pm AEST may not be processed until the following business day.
During peak periods (Black Friday, Boxing Day, new launches) processing may extend to 3 business days. You'll receive a confirmation email the moment your order is dispatched.

settings.title: Shipping Times
settings.body:
DestinationStandardExpress
Australia3–7 business days1–3 business days (+$12)
New Zealand5–10 business days3–5 business days (+$15)
USA & Canada7–14 business days4–7 business days (+$20)
UK & Europe7–14 business days4–7 business days (+$20)
Rest of World10–21 business days—
Timeframes are estimates from dispatch, not from order placement. Rural or remote areas may experience slightly longer delivery windows.

settings.title: Tracking Your Order
settings.body:
Every order includes full tracking. Once dispatched, you'll receive an email with your tracking number and a link to follow your parcel in real time.
If your tracking hasn't updated in 5+ business days, please contact us and we'll investigate immediately.

settings.title: Customs, Duties & Taxes
settings.body:
International orders may be subject to customs duties, import taxes, or brokerage fees imposed by your country's government. These charges are the responsibility of the recipient and are not included in the order total.
Tip: Most orders under your country's de minimis threshold clear customs without additional charges. Check your local customs authority for current thresholds.
